method: Set a sizable saucepan over medium heat and melt the butter.
Cook onion and celery in the butter as you stir occasionally.
Add garlic to cook for around 2 minutes.
Add red pepper, curry powder, and flour to cook. Stir properly for around 1
Add chicken broth before bringing it to a slight boil. Lower the heat and
simmer for approximately about 20 minutes as you stir occasionally.
Add peanut butter and coconut milk, then mix properly. Keep heating and
Ladle the soup into the food processor and blend to smoothness.
Transfer the soup into bowls before garnishing with some chopped peanuts.
